description.brazilian: Como Kain, alimente-se 125 vezes
description.english: As Kain, feed 125 times
description.french: En incarnant Kain, se nourrir 125 fois
description.german: Trinke als Kain 125-mal Blut.
description.italian: Nei panni di Kain, nutriti 125 volte
description.japanese: ケインで125回吸血する
description.russian: Играя за Каина, испейте крови 125 раз
description.schinese: 作为凯恩，噬血125次
description.spanish: Haz que Kain se alimente 125 veces.

description.brazilian: Como Raziel, devore 250 almas
description.english: As Raziel, devour 250 souls
description.french: En incarnant Raziel, dévorer 250 âmes
description.german: Verschlinge als Raziel 250 Seelen.
description.italian: Nei panni di Raziel, divora 250 anime
description.japanese: ラジエルで250回吸魂する
description.russian: Играя за Разиэля, поглотите 250 душ
description.schinese: 作为拉齐尔，吞噬250个灵魂
description.spanish: Haz que Raziel devore 250 almas.

description.brazilian: Como Kain, alimente-se de três fontes de sangue ao mesmo tempo
description.english: As Kain, feed from three sources of blood at once
description.french: En incarnant Kain, se nourrir de trois sources de sang à la fois
description.german: Trinke als Kain Blut aus drei verschiedenen Quellen auf einmal.
description.italian: Nei panni di Kain, nutriti da tre fonti di sangue nello stesso momento
description.japanese: ケインで同時に3体から吸血する
description.russian: Играя за Каина, испейте из трех источников крови за раз
description.schinese: 作为凯恩，同时从三处不同血源进行噬血
description.spanish: Haz que Kain se alimente de tres fuentes de sangre a la vez.

description.brazilian: Alimente-se de 75 recipientes de sangue e alma
description.english: Feed from 75 blood and soul basins
description.french: Se nourrir grâce à une vasque de sang ou d'âmes 75 fois
description.german: Nähre dich von 75 Blut- und Seelenbecken.
description.italian: Nutriti da 75 vasche di sangue e anime
description.japanese: 血と魂の器から75回吸収する
description.russian: Испейте из 75 купелей душ и крови
description.schinese: 从75处血池与混池噬血
description.spanish: Aliméntate de 75 piletas de sangre y almas.

description.brazilian: Mate 500 inimigos
description.english: Slay 500 enemies
description.french: Tuer 500 ennemis
description.german: Töte 500 Gegner.
description.italian: Trucida 500 nemici
description.japanese: 500体の敵を殺す
description.russian: Одолейте 500 врагов
description.schinese: 击杀500名敌人
description.spanish: Aniquila 500 enemigos.

description.brazilian: Execute 100 alimentações em curta distância
description.english: Perform 100 close-quarters feedings
description.french: Drainer 100 ennemis proches
description.german: Führe 100 Verzehrungen aus der Nähe aus.
description.italian: Nutriti 100 volte a distanza ravvicinata
description.japanese: 至近距離から100回吸収する
description.russian: Испейте крови в ближнем бою 100 раз
description.schinese: 近距离噬血100次
description.spanish: Aliméntate de cerca 100 veces.

description.brazilian: Alimente a Ceifadora 100 vezes
description.english: Feed the Reaver 100 times
description.french: Nourrir la Soul Reaver 100 fois
description.german: Stärke den Soul Reaver 100-mal.
description.italian: Nutri la Mietitrice 100 volte
description.japanese: リーバーで100回吸収する
description.russian: Насытьте Похититель 100 раз
description.schinese: 供养吞噬者100次
description.spanish: Alimenta a la Segadora 100 veces.

description.brazilian: Use todos os feitiços da Ceifadora de Kain e Raziel
description.english: Cast all of Kain and Raziel's Reaver Spells
description.french: Lancer tous les sorts de la Soul Reaver de Kain et de Raziel
description.german: Wirke alle Reaver-Zauber mit Kain und Raziel.
description.italian: Lancia tutti gli incantesimi della Mietitrice di Kain e Raziel
description.japanese: ケインとラジエルのリーバーの呪文を全て放つ
description.russian: Используйте все заклинания Похитителя у Каина и Разиэля
description.schinese: 施展凯恩和拉齐尔的所有吞噬者法术
description.spanish: Lanza todos los hechizos de Segadora de Kain y Raziel.

description.brazilian: Empale 50 inimigos em espinhos na parede
description.english: Impale 50 enemies on wall spikes
description.french: Empaler 50 ennemis sur des piques muraux
description.german: Pfähle 50 Gegner auf Spieße an der Wand auf.
description.italian: Impala 50 nemici sugli spuntoni al muro
description.japanese: 50体の敵を壁に串刺しにする
description.russian: Насадите 50 врагов на настенные шипы
description.schinese: 将50名敌人刺穿在墙上
description.spanish: Impala a 50 enemigos en picas de pared.

description.brazilian: Empurre 50 inimigos para a morte
description.english: Cast 50 enemies to their deaths
description.french: Projeter 50 ennemis dans le vide
description.german: Stoße 50 Gegner in den Tod.
description.italian: Scaglia 50 nemici verso la morte
description.japanese: 50体の敵を落下死させる
description.russian: Сбросьте 50 врагов с высоты
description.schinese: 以投掷方式击杀50名敌人
description.spanish: Arroja a 50 enemigos a su perecer.

description.brazilian: Causar 75 Imolações
description.english: Cause 75 immolations
description.french: Immoler 75 ennemis
description.german: Verursache 75 Opferungen.
description.italian: Provoca 75 immolazioni
description.japanese: 75体の敵を焼殺する
description.russian: Принести 75 жертвоприношений
description.schinese: 造成７５次献祭
description.spanish: Haz 75 inmolaciones.

description.brazilian: Afogue 25 inimigos
description.english: Drown 25 enemies
description.french: Noyer 25 ennemis
description.german: Ertränke 25 Gegner.
description.italian: Annega 25 nemici
description.japanese: 25体の敵を溺死させる
description.russian: Утопите 25 врагов
description.schinese: 溺毙25名敌人
description.spanish: Ahoga 25 enemigos.

description.brazilian: Faça 25 inimigos se matarem
description.english: Cause 25 enemies to slay each other
description.french: Forcer 25 ennemis à s'entretuer
description.german: Bringe 25 Gegner dazu, sich gegenseitig zu töten.
description.italian: 25 nemici devono trucidarsi a vicenda
description.japanese: 25体の敵を同士討ちさせる
description.russian: Заставьте врага убить товарища 25 раз
description.schinese: 令25名敌人互相残杀
description.spanish: Haz que 25 enemigos se aniquilen entre sí.

description.brazilian: Ofusque 50 inimigos
description.english: Blind 50 enemies
description.french: Aveugler 50 ennemis
description.german: Blende 50 Gegner.
description.italian: Acceca 50 nemici
description.japanese: 50体の敵を盲目状態にする
description.russian: Ослепите 50 врагов
description.schinese: 致盲50名敌人
description.spanish: Ciega 50 enemigos.

displayName.brazilian: Um Prato que se Come Frio
displayName.french: Un plat qui se mange froid
displayName.japanese: キンキンに冷えてます

description.brazilian: Congele 50 inimigos
description.english: Freeze 50 enemies
description.french: Geler 50 ennemis
description.german: Friere 50 Gegner ein.
description.italian: Congela 50 nemici
description.japanese: 50体の敵を凍らせる
description.russian: Заморозьте 50 врагов
description.schinese: 冻结50名敌人
description.spanish: Congela 50 enemigos.

description.brazilian: Como Raziel, troque de reinos 50 vezes
description.english: As Raziel, shift realms 50 times
description.french: En incarnant Raziel, effectuer une translocation planaire 50 fois
description.german: Führe als Raziel 50 Dimensionswechsel aus.
description.italian: Nei panni di Raziel, effettua 50 passaggi di regno
description.japanese: ラジエルで50回転移する
description.russian: Играя за Разиэля, переместитесь между мирами 50 раз
description.schinese: 作为拉齐尔，切换50次界域
description.spanish: Realiza 50 cambios de reino con Raziel.

description.brazilian: Execute todos os ataques especiais de Kain e Raziel
description.english: Execute all of Kain and Raziel's Special Attacks
description.french: Effectuer toutes les attaques spéciales de Kain et de Raziel
description.german: Führe alle Spezialangriffe von Kain und Raziel aus.
description.italian: Sferra tutti gli attacchi speciali di Kain e Raziel
description.japanese: ケインとラジエルのスペシャルアタックを全て放つ
description.russian: Используйте все специальные приемы Каина и Разиэля
description.schinese: 施展凯恩和拉齐尔的所有特殊攻击
description.spanish: Realiza todos los ataques especiales de Kain y Raziel.

description.brazilian: Execute os ataques especiais de Kain e Raziel 50 vezes
description.english: Execute Kain and Raziel's Special Attacks 50 times
description.french: Effectuer les attaques spéciales de Kain et de Raziel 50 fois
description.german: Führe die Spezialangriffe von Kain und Raziel 50-mal aus.
description.italian: Sferra 50 volte gli attacchi speciali di Kain e Raziel
description.japanese: ケインとラジエルのスペシャルアタックを50回放つ
description.russian: Используйте специальные приемы Каина и Разиэля 50 раз
description.schinese: 施展50次凯恩和拉齐尔的特殊攻击
description.spanish: Realiza ataques especiales con Kain y Raziel 50 veces.

description.brazilian: Colete todos os Talismãs de Vida de Kain e Raziel
description.english: Collect all of Kain and Raziel's Health Talismans
description.french: Récupérer tous les talismans de santé de Kain et de Raziel
description.german: Sammle alle Gesundheitstalismane von Kain und Raziel.
description.italian: Raccogli tutti i talismani della salute di Kain e Raziel
description.japanese: ケインとラジエルの命の守りを全て集める
description.russian: Соберите все талисманы здоровья, играя за Каина и Разиэля
description.schinese: 集齐凯恩和拉齐尔的所有血量护符
description.spanish: Encuentra todos los talismanes de salud de Kain y Raziel.

description.brazilian: Colete todas as Runas de Telecinese de Kain e Raziel
description.english: Collect all of Kain and Raziel's Telekinetic Runes
description.french: Récupérer toutes les runes de télékinésie de Kain et de Raziel
description.german: Sammle alle Telekinetischen Runen von Kain und Raziel.
description.italian: Raccogli tutte le rune telecinetiche di Kain e Raziel
description.japanese: ケインとラジエルの念力のルーンを全て集める
description.russian: Соберите все руны телекинеза, играя за Каина и Разиэля
description.schinese: 集齐凯恩和拉齐尔的所有念力符文
description.spanish: Encuentra todas las runas telekinéticas de Kain y Raziel.

description.brazilian: Colete todos os Tomos Arcanos de Kain e Raziel
description.english: Collect all of Kain and Raziel's Arcane Tomes
description.french: Récupérer tous les tomes des Arcanes de Kain et de Raziel
description.german: Sammle alle Arkanen Folianten von Kain und Raziel.
description.italian: Raccogli tutti i tomi arcani di Kain e Raziel
description.japanese: ケインとラジエルの秘伝書を全て集める
description.russian: Соберите все мистические скрижали, играя за Каина и Разиэля
description.schinese: 集齐凯恩和拉齐尔的所有密卷
description.spanish: Encuentra todos los tomos arcanos de Kain y Raziel.

displayName.spanish: Mantén la cabeza sobre los hombros

description.brazilian: Faça a guilhotina da masmorra da fortaleza cair
description.english: Cause the guillotine in the Stronghold's Dungeon to fall
description.french: Faire tomber la guillotine dans le donjon de la Forteresse
description.german: Löse die Guillotine im Kerker der Festung aus.
description.italian: Attiva la ghigliottina nella Prigione della Fortezza
description.japanese: 砦の牢獄にあるギロチンを落下させる
description.russian: Опустите лезвие гильотины в подземелье крепости
description.schinese: 使要塞地牢中的断头台落下
description.spanish: Haz que caiga la guillotina de la mazmorra de la fortaleza.

description.brazilian: Jogue seis Sluagh do submundo em um abismo
description.english: Cast six Sluagh in the Underworld into a chasm
description.french: Lancer six Sluagh du monde du dessous dans un gouffre
description.german: Stoße sechs Sluagh in der Unterwelt in einen Abgrund.
description.italian: Getta sei Slaugh in un abisso nell'Oltretomba
description.japanese: 地下世界で6体のスルーアを深淵に落とす
description.russian: Сбросьте в бездну шесть слуа, будучи в загробном мире
description.schinese: 使冥界中的六名冤魂坠入深渊
description.spanish: Arroja a 6 sluagh al abismo en el Inframundo.

description.brazilian: Devore três almas na Câmara Ascendente do submundo
description.english: Devour three souls in the Underworld's Ascending Chamber
description.french: Dévorer trois âmes dans la chambre ascendante du monde du dessous
description.german: Verzehre drei Seelen in der Aufsteigenden Kammer in der Unterwelt.
description.italian: Divora tre anime nella Camera dell'Ascensione dell'Oltretomba
description.japanese: 地下世界の上昇の洞窟で3つの魂を喰らう
description.russian: Поглотите три души в восходящей зале загробного мира
description.schinese: 吞噬冥界上升殿堂中的三个灵魂
description.spanish: Devora tres almas en la Cámara Ascendente del Inframundo.

description.brazilian: Fique no topo da estátua de Malek no pátio da fortaleza
description.english: Stand on top of Malek's statue in the Stronghold's Courtyard
description.french: Se tenir au sommet de la statue de Malek dans la cour de la Forteresse
description.german: Stehe auf Maleks Statue im Innenhof der Festung.
description.italian: Sali in cima alla statua di Malek nel Cortile della Fortezza
description.japanese: 砦の中庭でマレクの像の上に立つ
description.russian: Заберитесь на статую Малека во дворе крепости
description.schinese: 站在要塞庭院内的马利克雕像头顶
description.spanish: Álzate a la cima de la estatua de Malek en el patio de la fortaleza.

description.brazilian: Puxe Arqueiros Sarafan de 10 torres
description.english: Pull Sarafan Archers from 10 Loophole Towers
description.french: Faire tomber des archers séraphéens d'une tour de faille 10 fois
description.german: Ziehe sarafanische Bogenschützen aus 10 Schießschartentürmen.
description.italian: Fai uscire gli Arcieri Sarafan da 10 Torri
description.japanese: 10の見張り塔からサラファンの弓兵を引きずり出す
description.russian: Вытащите 10 серафанских лучников из-за бойниц
description.schinese: 从萨拉夫的箭塔上拽下10个弓箭手
description.spanish: Tira arqueros sárafan de 10 torres del resquicio.

description.brazilian: Destrua as duas estátuas Sarafan na ponte da fortaleza
description.english: Destroy both Sarafan statues at the Stronghold's Bridge
description.french: Détruire les deux statues de Séraphéens près du pont de la Forteresse
description.german: Zerstöre beide sarafanischen Statuen bei der Brücke der Festung.
description.italian: Distruggi entrambe le statue Sarafan al Ponte della Fortezza
description.japanese: 砦の橋で2体のサラファンの像を破壊する
description.russian: Разрушьте обе статуи серафанцев на мосту крепости
description.schinese: 摧毁要塞大桥的两座萨拉夫雕像
description.spanish: Destruye las dos estatuas sárafan del puente de la fortaleza.

displayName.japanese: アングレイトフル・デッド

description.brazilian: Destrua 40 lápides no Cemitério Principal
description.english: Destroy 40 tombstones in the Main Cemetery
description.french: Détruire 40 pierres tombales dans le cimetière principal
description.german: Zerstöre 40 Grabsteine auf dem Hauptfriedhof.
description.italian: Distruggi 40 pietre tombali nel Cimitero principale
description.japanese: 中央墓地で墓を40基破壊する
description.russian: Уничтожьте 40 надгробий на кладбище
description.schinese: 摧毁主墓园中的40座墓碑
description.spanish: Destruye 40 tumbas en el cementerio central.

description.brazilian: Complete o tutorial de combate em até 90 segundos
description.english: Complete the combat tutorial within 90 seconds
description.french: Terminer le didacticiel de combat en moins de 90 secondes
description.german: Schließe das Kampftutorial innerhalb von 90 Sekunden ab.
description.italian: Completa il tutorial di combattimento entro 90 secondi
description.japanese: 90秒以内に戦闘チュートリアルを完了する
description.russian: Пройдите боевое обучение за 90 секунд
description.schinese: 在９０秒内完成战斗教程
description.spanish: Completa el tutorial de combate en menos de 90 segundos.

description.brazilian: Seja empurrado para um objeto quebrável por um inimigo
description.english: Get knocked into a breakable object by an enemy
description.french: Se faire projeter contre un objet destructible par un ennemi
description.german: Werde von einem Gegner in ein zerbrechliches Objekt gestoßen.
description.italian: Fatti spingere da un nemico contro un oggetto fragile
description.japanese: 敵の攻撃を受けて破壊可能な物体に衝突する
description.russian: Позвольте противнику толкнуть себя на разрушаемый объект
description.schinese: 被敌人击倒并砸向可破坏物体
description.spanish: Haz que un enemigo te lance contra un objeto rompible.

displayName.french: Quand le chasseur devient la proie
displayName.russian: Кто к нам с колом придет...

description.brazilian: Elimine o máximo possível de Caçadores de Vampiros nos Pilares
description.english: Eliminate as many Vampire Hunters as possible at the Pillars
description.french: Éliminer autant de chasseurs de vampires que possible près des Colonnes
description.german: Töte bei den Säulen so viele Vampirjäger wie möglich.
description.italian: Elimina quanti più Cacciatori di Vampiri possibile presso i Pilastri
description.japanese: 柱でできるだけ多くのヴァンパイアハンターを倒す
description.russian: Убейте у Столпов как можно больше охотников на вампиров
description.schinese: 在支柱消灭尽可能多的吸血鬼猎人
description.spanish: Aniquila tantos cazadores de vampiros como se pueda en los pilares.

displayName.french: Ne lui jette pas la première pierre
displayName.japanese: 罪なき者まず石をなげうて

description.brazilian: Faça um Golem Vampírico destruir o outro
description.english: Cause one Vampire Golem to destroy another
description.french: Faire en sorte qu'un golem vampire en détruise un autre
description.german: Bringe einen Vampirgolem dazu, einen anderen zu zerstören.
description.italian: Fai in modo che un Golem Vampiro ne distrugga un altro
description.japanese: 1体のヴァンパイアゴーレムにもう1体を破壊させる
description.russian: Заставьте одного вампирского голема уничтожить другого
description.schinese: 使一座吸血鬼魔像击碎另一座
description.spanish: Haz que un gólem vampírico destruya a otro.

displayName.japanese: インテリアデザイナー

description.brazilian: Destrua o máximo possível de objetos na Mansão de Vorador
description.english: Destroy as many breakables as possible in Vorador's Mansion
description.french: Briser autant d'objets destructibles que possible dans le manoir de Vorador
description.german: Zerstöre so viele zerbrechliche Objekte wie möglich in Voradors Anwesen.
description.italian: Distruggi quanti più oggetti fragili possibile nella Villa di Vorador
description.japanese: ヴォラドールの館でできるだけ多くの破壊可能な物体を破壊する
description.russian: Уничтожьте как можно больше предметов в поместье Ворадора
description.schinese: 在沃拉德宫殿摧毁尽可能多的可破坏物体
description.spanish: Destruye tantos objetos destruibles como se pueda en la mansión de Vorador.

description.brazilian: Derrote dois Espectros dos Guardiões em um intervalo de 10 segundos entre si
description.english: Defeat two Guardian Wraiths within 10 seconds of each other
description.french: Vaincre deux spectres gardiens à moins de 10 secondes d'intervalle
description.german: Besiege zwei Hütergeister innerhalb von 10 Sekunden.
description.italian: Sconfiggi due Spettri Guardiani entro 10 secondi l'uno dall'altro
description.japanese: 10秒以内の間隔で守護者の亡霊を2体倒す
description.russian: Победите двух духов Хранителей с промежутком не более 10 секунд
description.schinese: 在10秒内相继击败两名幽魂守卫
description.spanish: Derrota a dos espectros guardianes con menos de 10 segundos de diferencia.

description.brazilian: Elimine o máximo possível de Humanos Selvagens na Cidadela Vampírica
description.english: Wipe out as many Feral Humans as possible in the Vampire Citadel
description.french: Éliminer autant d'humains sauvages que possible dans la Citadelle des vampires
description.german: Töte so viele Wilde wie möglich in der Zitadelle der Vampire.
description.italian: Annienta quanti più Umani Feroci possibile nella Cittadella dei Vampiri
description.japanese: ヴァンパイアの要塞でできるだけ多くの野生の人間を倒す
description.russian: Уничтожьте как можно больше одичалых людей в твердыне вампиров
description.schinese: 在吸血鬼城堡内清除尽可能多的野蛮人
description.spanish: Aniquila tantos humanos salvajes como se pueda en la ciudadela de los vampiros.

description.brazilian: Execute um ataque de elevação contra cinco inimigos ao mesmo tempo
description.english: Lift attack five enemies into the air simultaneously
description.french: Soulever cinq ennemis dans les airs simultanément
description.german: Nutze Wurfangriffe bei fünf Gegnern gleichzeitig.
description.italian: Solleva e attacca in aria cinque nemici in contemporanea
description.japanese: リフトアタックで同時に5体の敵を空中に跳ね上げる
description.russian: Поднимите одной атакой пять врагов в воздух одновременно
description.schinese: 同时抓取5名敌人至空中
description.spanish: Usa ataques de elevación para levantar a cinco enemigos a la vez.

displayName.japanese: スパークリングヴァンパイア

description.brazilian: Desoriente Turel com a Ceifadora da Luz
description.english: Disorient Turel with the Light Reaver
description.french: Désorienter Turel avec la Reaver de la lumière
description.german: Verwirre Turel mit dem Licht-Reaver.
description.italian: Disorienta Turel con la Mietitrice di Luce
description.japanese: ライトリーバーでトゥレルを混乱させる
description.russian: Дезориентируйте Турэла Похитителем Света
description.schinese: 使用光明吞噬者迷惑图雷尔
description.spanish: Desorienta a Turel con la Segadora de luz.

description.brazilian: Confronte Mortanius no Reino Espectral
description.english: Confront Mortanius in the Spectral Realm
description.french: Confronter Mortanius dans la sphère spectrale
description.german: Trete Mortanius in der Geisterwelt entgegen.
description.italian: Affronta Mortanius nel Regno Spettrale
description.japanese: 精神界でモータニアスと対峙する
description.russian: Встретьтесь с Мортаниусом в призрачном мире
description.schinese: 在灵界与莫坦尼斯对峙
description.spanish: Enfréntate a Mortanius en el reino espectral.

displayName.japanese: 勇気なくして栄光なし

description.brazilian: Escape de Kain com o feitiço Manto Umbral
description.english: Evade Kain with the Umbral Cloak Spell
description.french: Échapper à Kain avec le sort Cape des ombres
description.german: Gehe Kain mit dem Schattenmantel-Zauber aus dem Weg.
description.italian: Sfuggi a Kain grazie all'incantesimo Mantello oscuro
description.japanese: 陰影の衣でケインの攻撃を回避する
description.russian: Скройтесь от Каина при помощи "Плаща теней"
description.schinese: 使用暗影斗篷法术避开凯恩
description.spanish: Esquiva a Kain con el hechizo de túnica umbría.

description.brazilian: Derrote um dos Transformados debaixo d'água
description.english: Defeat one of the Transformed underwater
description.french: Vaincre un ennemi transformé sous l'eau
description.german: Besiege einen Verwandelten unter Wasser.
description.italian: Sconfiggi uno dei Tramutati sott'acqua
description.japanese: 水中で変異体を1体倒す
description.russian: Победите одного преображенного под водой
description.schinese: 在水下击败一名变形怪
description.spanish: Derrota a uno de los convertidos bajo el agua.

description.brazilian: Derrote o máximo possível de Arcontes na Mansão Arruinada de Vorador
description.english: Defeat as many Archons as possible in Vorador's Ruined Mansion
description.french: Vaincre autant d'Archontes que possible dans le manoir en ruines de Vorador
description.german: Besiege so viele Archonten wie möglich in Voradors verfallenem Anwesen.
description.italian: Sconfiggi quanti più Arconti possibile alle Rovine della Villa di Vorador
description.japanese: 荒廃したヴォラドールの館でできるだけ多くのアルコーンを倒す
description.russian: Победите как можно больше архонтов в разрушенном поместье Ворадора
description.schinese: 在沃拉德宫殿遗址击败尽可能多的执政官
description.spanish: Destruye tantos Arcontes como se pueda en las ruinas de la mansión de Vorador.

description.brazilian: Resolva a Forja dos Espíritos em até três minutos
description.english: Solve the Spirit Forge within three minutes
description.french: Résoudre l'énigme de la forge de l'Esprit en moins de trois minutes
description.german: Löse das Rätsel der Geistschmiede innerhalb von drei Minuten.
description.italian: Completa la Forgia dello Spirito in tre minuti
description.japanese: 3分以内に魂の炉を解放する
description.russian: Решите загадку кузни Духа за три минуты
description.schinese: 在3分钟内揭秘灵之熔炉
description.spanish: Soluciona la forja espiritual en tres minutos.

description.brazilian: Derrote Janos Possuído sem usar a Ceifadora dos Espíritos
description.english: Defeat Possessed Janos without using the Spirit Reaver
description.french: Vaincre Janos possédé sans utiliser la Reaver de l'Esprit
description.german: Besiege den besessenen Janos, ohne den Geist-Reaver zu verwenden.
description.italian: Sconfiggi Janos Posseduto senza usare la Mietitrice di Spirito
description.japanese: スピリットリーバーを使わずに憑依されたヤーノスを倒す
description.russian: Победите одержимого Яноса без помощи Похитителя Духа
description.schinese: 在不使用精神吞噬者的条件下击败被附身的贾诺斯
description.spanish: Derrota a Janos poseído sin usar la Segadora de espíritus.

description.brazilian: Como Kain, flutue no ar por pelo menos 13 segundos
description.english: As Kain, float in the air for at least 13 seconds
description.french: En incarnant Kain, flotter dans les airs pendant au moins 13 secondes
description.german: Schwebe als Kain wenigstens 13 Sekunden lang in der Luft.
description.italian: Nei panni di Kain, fluttua a mezz'aria per almeno 13 secondi
description.japanese: ケインで13秒以上宙に浮く
description.russian: Играя за Каина, пролетите 13 секунд
description.schinese: 作为凯恩，在空中滑行至少13秒
description.spanish: Flota durante al menos 13 segundos con Kain.

description.brazilian: Derrote o Deus Antigo somente com Telecinese
description.english: Defeat the Elder God with only telekinesis
description.french: Vaincre l'Ancien avec la télékinésie uniquement
description.german: Besiege den Alten Gott ausschließlich mit Telekinese.
description.italian: Sconfiggi il Dio Anziano usando solo la telecinesi
description.japanese: 念力だけでエルダーゴッドを倒す
description.russian: Победите Древнего Бога, используя только телекинез
description.schinese: 仅靠念力战胜上古之神
description.spanish: Derrota al Dios Anciano usando solo telekinesis.

description.brazilian: Termine o jogo em até seis horas
description.english: Complete the game within six hours
description.french: Terminer le jeu en moins de six heures
description.german: Beende das Spiel innerhalb von sechs Stunden.
description.italian: Finisci il gioco in meno di sei ore
description.japanese: 6時間以内にクリアする
description.russian: Пройдите игру за 6 и менее часов
description.schinese: 在6小时内通关游戏
description.spanish: Acaba el juego en seis horas o menos.
